title.rendered: Superwork Data Analytics Internship 2026 (Work From Home) – ₹27,500 Stipend & Up to ₹8 LPA Job Offer

content.rendered:
Students and freshers looking for a high-paying remote internship opportunity can now apply for the Data Analytics Internship 2026 offered by Superwork. The internship is completely work from home and offers a monthly stipend of up to ₹27,500, along with a potential full-time job offer up to ₹8 LPA after successful completion.

This internship is ideal for candidates interested in Data Analytics, Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, and Data Science.

Superwork Data Analytics Internship 2026 – Overview

About Superwork

Superwork is an on-demand task execution platform that helps businesses complete predefined tasks without traditional hiring processes.

The platform focuses on outcome-based work execution and works with startups, SMEs, operations teams, and tech companies across India.

Roles and Responsibilities

Selected interns will work closely with the analytics and data teams. The internship includes real-world business analytics tasks and dashboard creation.

Day-to-Day Responsibilities

  • Extract and manipulate datasets using Python and SQL
  • Clean and prepare data using MS Excel
  • Create dashboards using Power BI and Tableau
  • Analyze business data to identify trends and insights
  • Collaborate with different teams for data-driven solutions
  • Assist in building data models and algorithms
  • Present reports and recommendations to stakeholders

This role provides practical exposure to industry-level analytics workflows.

Skills Required

Candidates should have knowledge of the following skills:

  • Python
  • SQL
  • MS Excel
  • Power BI
  • Tableau
  • Data Analysis
  • Data Cleaning
  • Data Science
  • Data Manipulation
  • Data Extraction
  • Data Interpretation

Students with strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills will have an advantage.

Who Can Apply?

Candidates can apply if they:

  1. Are available for the work-from-home internship
  2. Can start between 18 May 2026 and 22 June 2026
  3. Are available for 3 months
  4. Have relevant skills and interests in Data Analytics

Internship Benefits

Selected interns will receive:

  • Internship Certificate
  • Letter of Recommendation
  • Flexible Working Hours
  • 5-Day Work Week
  • Work From Home Opportunity
  • PPO/Full-Time Job Opportunity

Salary After Internship

Candidates who successfully convert into full-time employees may receive a package between:

₹6.5 LPA to ₹8 LPA

This makes it one of the best internships currently available for students interested in analytics and data science.

Why You Should Apply

Here are some major reasons why this internship stands out:

  • High stipend compared to regular internships
  • Remote work flexibility
  • Hands-on industry experience
  • Exposure to analytics tools used in companies
  • Strong resume-building opportunity
  • Chance to secure a high-paying job offer

For students aiming to enter the fields of Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, or Data Science, this internship can be a valuable career opportunity.

Important Dates

Apply Online

Internship Application Link

Apply for Superwork Data Analytics Internship 2026

Final Words

The Superwork Data Analytics Internship 2026 is one of the best work-from-home opportunities currently available for students and freshers interested in analytics and data science.

With a stipend up to ₹27,500/month, practical industry exposure, and a possible ₹8 LPA job offer, this internship offers both learning and career growth.

Interested candidates should apply before the deadline to secure their chance.

FAQs

Is the Superwork internship work from home?

Yes, the internship is completely remote/work from home.

What is the internship duration?

The internship duration is 3 months.

What is the stipend offered?

Selected candidates will receive ₹26,000 to ₹27,500 per month.

What skills are required?

Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Excel, and Data Analytics skills are required.

Is there a PPO after the internship?

Yes, candidates may receive a full-time offer up to ₹8 LPA after successful completion.
